pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm F. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting, isn't it? What's your name, and what brings you to the game today?
Hey F, I'm I. It definitely is intense. I'm here to win whatever I can for my family—they really need the support right now.
I hear you, I. Family is a huge motivator. I'm in a similar boat, just trying to look out for the people I care about. It’s good to have something worth fighting for.
Exactly. It keeps your head in the game. What would winning this mean for your people?
It would mean stability—just knowing they don't have to worry about the next bill or emergency would be a massive weight off our shoulders.
I completely understand. Having that peace of mind would be life-changing for all of us.
Exactly. It’s hard not to think about them while we’re just sitting here waiting. Hopefully, we can both make it happen.
I hope so too. It’s good to know I’m not the only one here with a lot on the line.
For sure. It makes the pressure feel a bit more real, but it’s good to have that focus. Let's see what happens when the game starts.
I’m with you on that. Let's hope for the best for both our families. Good luck, F.
Thanks, I. Good luck to you too, let's do our best for them.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all chose the fair share of $10,000. Thanks for your part in that.
I agree, it was the fair choice and I'm glad we both walked away with $10,000. You're very welcome.
